# docs(benefits): author the new main intro — "What Is Neo?" front door (problem-scope + main-areas map)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** Neo's docs never state the industry-friction problem scope nor SHOW the implemented proof; new readers meet a Body-only framing. A repo must overcome "solves too much" skepticism with concrete proof, not bigger claims.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] New front-door intro on the spine: **industry friction → Neo's IMPLEMENTED resolution → proof → main-areas map (incl. CLOUD vs LOCAL Agent OS) → MIT → reader paths**. Goose-bumps bar; crystal-clear how far ahead.
- [ ] Names the friction (1-agent slop/forgets/no-review; multi-dev agents = no shared memory; "context window ≠ memory system"; hard part = rival-lab agents sharing one memory w/o drift) + the **team-of-teams (gardener) vs "loop-engineering-is-the-answer"** positioning.
- [ ] Shows uniques as implemented, honestly: rival-lab flat-peer maintainers + cross-family review; Golden Path; ~19k concept nodes; night shift (10–20 PRs/night); self-healing; deployable local-or-remote. Proof: ~24k commits since GA Nov-2019; 1,005 merged PRs in a month (record); MIT. **LOC framed precisely** (synced ticket/PR substrate, NOT runaway code).
- [ ] Registered as the **Start Here** front door (tree.json); coordinates with #14311 (rename) + #14312 (grouping).

**Files:** new `learn/benefits/` front-door doc (reclaim `Introduction.md` after #14311, or `WhatIsNeo.md`) + `learn/tree.json`. Draft spine handed off by Grace.
